source_name: Swishy device and product showcase templates
content:
# Swishy device and product showcase templates - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: app launch page, product demo, mobile app preview, social launch video, hero showcase
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

Visual traits:
- device mockup
- laptop opening
- phone message preview
- app video showcase
- 3D perspective
- gallery

Use when:
- app launch page
- product demo
- mobile app preview
- social launch video
- hero showcase

Avoid when:
- enterprise admin daily workflow
- documentation page
- low bandwidth landing page

AI summary: Use device/product showcase motion for app launch and hero sections: phone/laptop mockup entry, perspective reveal, message pop-ups, and settled readable product screens, with static fallback.

source_name: Swishy device and product showcase templates
content:
# Swishy device and product showcase templates - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: app launch page, product demo, mobile app preview, social launch video, hero showcase
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use device motion to demonstrate product context before diving into feature details.
- Keep perspective motion slow and stable so UI content remains readable.
- Use mockup entry as a hero moment, then transition into static usable screenshots or cards.

AI summary: Use device/product showcase motion for app launch and hero sections: phone/laptop mockup entry, perspective reveal, message pop-ups, and settled readable product screens, with static fallback.

content:
# Swishy device and product showcase templates - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: app launch page, product demo, mobile app preview, social launch video, hero showcase
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Avoid motion sickness from large 3D rotations.
- Provide static screenshot alternative.
- Do not hide core product information inside video-only motion.

AI summary: Use device/product showcase motion for app launch and hero sections: phone/laptop mockup entry, perspective reveal, message pop-ups, and settled readable product screens, with static fallback.

source_name: Swishy device and product showcase templates
content:
# Swishy device and product showcase templates - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: app launch page, product demo, mobile app preview, social launch video, hero showcase
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use transform perspective with small rotations, not extreme spins, for product mockups.
- A 700-1200ms entry can work for hero sections; keep repeated interactions shorter.
- Liquid Glass UI pairs well with device mockups when glass controls float above the device frame.

AI summary: Use device/product showcase motion for app launch and hero sections: phone/laptop mockup entry, perspective reveal, message pop-ups, and settled readable product screens, with static fallback.
